mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emission_source ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_emission_source WHERE source_name LIKE '%' + #{sourceName} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emission_source WHERE source_name LIKE '%' + #{sourceName} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_emission_source WHERE status = 'OPERATING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emission_source (source_code, source_name, source_type, scope, location, status, annual_emission, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{sourceCode}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceType}, #{scope}, #{location}, #{status}, #{annualEmission}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emission_source SET source_code = #{sourceCode}, source_name = #{sourceName}, source_type = #{sourceType}, scope = #{scope}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, annual_emission = #{annualEmission}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
